name: CLX - MGA Insurance Compliance Score Calculate v1

nodes.name: Webhook
nodes.notes: DEACTIVATED. Daily 04:00. For each insurance-vertical MGA client, computes 7 component compliance scores + overall + risk level. Writes compliance_scores snapshot.

parameters.jsCode:
const rows = Array.isArray($input.item.json) ? $input.item.json : [];
return rows.map(function (c) { return { json: { client: c } }; });

const scored = $('Fan Out').all().length;
return { json: { ok: true, mgas_scored: scored } };
